unit.name: UState
unit.summary: Defines core data types and classes for representing state variables, parameters, and external variables in a crop simulation model. Provides a standardized way to handle variables that change over time (states), fixed model parameters, and variables imported from other modules or the environment.

item.info: Type or class for state variables (e.g., leaf area, biomass) updated during simulation.
Types or classes for model parameters (constants or tunable values).
Types or classes for external variables (inputs from other modules, weather, soil, etc.).
Type for model options or switches (e.g., to enable/disable certain processes).
General-purpose variable type, often for intermediate or calculated values.

enum.name: TExValue
enum.devnotes: enumeration type to for pointer, imortan for external state variables and external values, where the name of a state variable can mean either the state or the rate of change

devnotes.summary: THumeEntity is the base class for all objects representing either numerical values (states, variables, parameters, constants) or Options. If the destination is a console app it is derived from TObject. For the use of within the IDE/GUI applications it is derived from the TPersistent class.

field.name: fName
field.devnotes: private field for the name of the Entity

field.name: fSubmod
field.devnotes: field submodel to which the Entity belongs

field.name: Indexed
field.devnotes: indicates if the entity is indexed (array)

field.name: WriteToFile
field.devnotes: flag for output to text file

field.name: WriteToIniFile
field.devnotes: flag for output to Ini file

field.name: WasReadFromFile
field.devnotes: flag for initialisation from file, false indicates need for alternative initialisation

property.name: Opt_writetoFile
property.devnotes: Flag indicating whether to write output to a text file

property.name: Opt_SelForSensOut
property.devnotes: Flag indicating selection for sensitivity analysis output

devnotes.summary: TOption is a class representing an option with a string value and a list of possible options.

field.name: fOption
field.devnotes: the private field for the option string

constructor.name: create
constructor.devnotes: the constructor initializes the option with a name, default value, and comment

property.name: Option
property.devnotes: property to access the option string

devnotes.summary: THumeNumEntity is a base class for numerical entities in the model, such as variables and external values. It extends THumeEntity with properties for numerical values, units, and flags for plotting and output.

field.name: fv
field.devnotes: private field with numerical value of the entity

field.name: DefaultValue
field.devnotes: default value for parameters, states (Ini value)

field.name: fGlobalOutput
field.devnotes: flag for selection to global output file

field.name: WriteFinalValue
field.devnotes: flag for extra output of final values in file

field.name: IsMeasured
field.devnotes: flag if measured data are available

procedure.name: write_declaration
procedure.devnotes: writes the declaration code for entity into source code file

procedure.name: write_property
procedure.devnotes: writes the property code for entity into source code file

procedure.name: write_Create
procedure.devnotes: writes the creation code for entity into source code file

property.name: Opt_PlotToGraph
property.devnotes: property for optional plotting to graph

property.name: Opt_WriteFinalValue
property.devnotes: property for the optional output of final values

property.name: Digits
property.devnotes: property for the digits used in output (default is 2 digits)

property.name: Precision
property.devnotes: property for the precision of the numerical value

property.name: GlobalOutput
property.devnotes: property for the flag indicating if the entity is written to a global output file

property.name: v
property.devnotes: property for the numerical value of the entity

devnotes.summary: TVar is a class representing a variable, i.e. a value that can be calculated for each time step in the model from other variables, state variables or parameters. It extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for self writing of source code for its initialization, rate calculation.

field.name: RateSTring
field.devnotes: String containing source code for rate calculation

field.name: IniString
field.devnotes: String containing source code for intialisation

constructor.name: create
constructor.devnotes: constructor procedure to create a variable with name, units, value and comment

devnotes.summary: TPar is a class representing a parameter variable in the model, which can be selected for optimization or sensitivity analysis. It extends TVar and adds properties for maximum and minimum expected values, error, and selection flags.

field.name: fmax
field.devnotes: maximum expected value added 12.01.05 for GA optimisation hk

constructor.name: create
constructor.devnotes: constructor procedure to create a parameter with name, units, value, error and comment

property.name: opt_SelForSens
property.devnotes: property for selectgion for sensitivity analysis

devnotes.summary: TState is a class representing a state variable in the model, which has an initial value and a rate of change. It extends TVar and provides a constructor for creating state variables with initial value, change rate, and comment.

constructor.name: create
constructor.devnotes: constructor procedure to create a state variable with name, units, initial value, change rate and comment

devnotes.summary: TExternV is a class representing an external variable in the model. Values of model elements outside a submodel are called "external variables". They can be made accessible by adressing a pointer for that value. The default method for setting the link to the external variable is to search for it in the model by its name. It extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for getting and setting the value, as well as creating the external variable with a name, units, and an external value type.

field.name: fSearch
field.devnotes: private field indicating if the external variable is searched for in the model if not, it is assumed to be set by connecting two submodels by a direct link

devnotes.summary: private field for the source of the external variable, e.g. a file or a submodel

function.name: get_value
function.devnotes: getter for the numerical value of the external variable

procedure.name: set_value
procedure.devnotes: setter for the numerical value of the external variable
